content:
Goal
* Please add:
A word may consist of any sequence of non-space characters. In the input string, words are separated by one or more space characters. In the output (modified) string, however, words must be separated by exactly one space character.

Input
* Please refer to the comment from @User123 below.

Constraints
* Please add:
1 ≤ length of [[string]] ≤ 100
[[string]] contains at least one word.

Solution / Cases
* More Whitespace (Test 4) and Validator 4: There are two spaces between the words in the output. Please fix your solution and the cases.

Cases
* Please add a new pair of cases where the input string contains exactly three words.

Thanks.

- It is currently unclear how the original string should be modified to only leave every third word. What should the player do with the whitespace(s) in between each word?

- Consider removing the description of how to process [[string]] from the Input section. The instruction is clearly stated in the problem description, so it doesn't need to be repeated. Alternatively, you could shift it into the Output section.

- Please add a constraint for the length of the input string, e.g., "1 ≤ length of [[string]] ≤ 256".
